When this creature enters, draw a card.
At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control an Equipment, you may pay {1}. When you do, attach target Equipment you control to target creature you control.

Boss spells and Event spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.
{W}{U}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature and three other artifacts and/or creatures: Call upon The Lunatic Cultist. Activate only as a sorcery. [i](Create a token that's a copy of a card named The Lunatic Cultist)[/i]

Whenever a creature you control with deathtouch deals damage to a creature, create a Treasure token.
{1}, {T}, Sacrifice a Treasure: Call upon Hunter's Blowgun.
Destroy target artifact an opponent controls. If it was a Boss, destroy each other artifact that player controls.

Partner with Prince of Slime [i](When this permanent enters, target player may put Prince of Slime into their hand from their library, then shuffle.)[/i]
Ooze spells you cast have affinity for Nobles. [i](They cost {1} less to cast for each Noble you control.)[/i]

Partner with Princess of Slime [i](When this permanent enters, target player may put Princess of Slime into their hand from their library, then shuffle.)[/i]
Oozes you control get +1/+1 for each Noble you control.

Whenever you scry or surveil, roll a d20.
Whenever you roll a die's highest result or a 10 or higher, create a Treasure token.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice a Treasure: Call upon Crystal Ball. [i](Create a token that's a copy of a card named Crystal Ball)[/i]

Whenever one or more modified creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token.
{T} or Sacrifice a Treasure: Put your choice of a menace, trample or haste counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

Whenever Enoki or another Citizen you control enters, create a 1/1 green Fungus creature token.
{T}, Sacrifice a Fungus or Saproling: Create a Food token or a Treasure token.

At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 0/1 green Plant creature token.
{T}, Sacrifice a Plant: Create a Clue token or a Treasure token.
{1}, {T}: Scry 2. [i](Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)[/i]
